title: firmware-analysis-walkthrough: A reproducible OpenWRT 22.03 firmware security analysis
description: A reproducible firmware security analysis pipeline applied to the OpenWRT 22.03.7 release image for the TP-Link Archer C7 v2 (ath79 / mips_24kc). The walkthrough covers signature scanning and extraction with binwalk, squashfs unpacking with unsquashfs, filesystem pattern scanning with firmwalker plus a curated credential-pattern scanner, dependency-version extraction from the OpenWRT opkg manifest, CVE correlation against the NVD 2.0 API, and headless Ghidra binary analysis of selected MIPS executables. The repository ships extraction and analysis scripts, a containerised reproduction Dockerfile, a pytest test suite for the CVE correlator, full setup and replication documentation, and a short companion paper describing the methodology.
